title: IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Indian Pharmacopoeia Commission (IPC) Scientific Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ipc.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. Norms.

qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences/Bio-Chemistry/Biotechnology/Chemistry/Pharmacology/Microbiology from a recognized University or equivalent Associate-ship diploma of the Institution of Chemists (India). One year experience in Chemical/Physio-chemical testing & analysis of drugs in drugs testing laboratory under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act and Rules. Desirable: Good knowledge of computer application.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IPC Scientific Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.ipc.gov.in/career.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
